scenes.title: Green Tea Leaf the Freshener

source_image.image_prompt: SUBJECT: A small anthropomorphic green tea leaf character — shiny, deep forest-green surface with fine leaf veins, upright humanoid form, tiny arms and legs, round friendly face with eyes FIRMLY SEALED and mouth completely CLOSED — no gap, no lips parted, zero open mouth. Face geometry LOCKED. CHARACTER LOCKED: same leaf shape, same green color, same size in all frames. ACTION: snapping into a dynamic martial arts striking pose — weight forward, one arm raised, confident and fierce expression — THIS IS BEAT 1 FROZEN FRAME. SETTING: standing CENTER-FRAME on a large pink tongue surface, wet and shiny like the inside of a mouth. In the background, a dark greenish fog entity (bad breath cloud) looms ominously. Bright, clean environment — pink walls of mouth visible in background. CAMERA: 9:16 vertical frame, character centered, full body visible, static shot. LIGHTING: bright studio-style overhead lighting, soft rim light on leaf character, slightly dramatic to emphasize the face-off mood. STYLE: Pixar 3D animated, vibrant colors, clean render, smooth surfaces, no grain, no watermarks. PURPOSE: This image will be used as a Veo 3.1 animation start frame — character position, expression, and environment must be photorealistic 3D render quality, absolutely no open mouth.
source_image.scene_description: Green Tea Leaf character in a wide-legged martial arts stance with arms raised, standing CENTER-FRAME on a glistening pink tongue surface inside an open mouth. Pink lips and teeth visible at the edges. Background shows the interior of a mouth — bright, clean. Character is shiny deep forest-green with visible leaf veins, fierce expression, mouth firmly SEALED.
source_image.allowed_animation_only: Character can animate its pose and arm movements per beat. Mouth OPENS only during Beat 2 (speaking). Bad breath cloud can animate — shrinks Beat 1, shatters Beat 3. Blue energy blast appears Beat 2. Camera slow push in on Beat 3 then settles. No repositioning of character from CENTER.
source_image.first_frame_instruction: FIXED FIRST FRAME: use the provided image exactly as Beat 1 start. Green Tea Leaf in wide martial arts stance, arms raised, mouth SEALED, standing on pink tongue surface. Character centered. Animate from this frame — do NOT alter character position, color, or expression at Beat 1.

scenes.description: Anthropomorphic green tea leaf — shiny deep forest-green body, visible leaf veins, upright humanoid with small arms and legs, wide-legged martial arts stance, round fierce face with prominent eyes, vibrant Pixar 3D style
scenes.face: SEALED — mouth completely closed for Beat 1 and Beat 3. OPENS naturally during Beat 2 only (speaker is talking).
scenes.face_geometry_lock: Face geometry LOCKED — same character face, same green leaf shape, same scale in all frames. Match exactly the face visible in the provided first frame image.
scenes.location_lock: CENTER-FRAME — character stays centered throughout all 3 beats, no repositioning

environment.setting: Interior of mouth — large glistening pink tongue surface as floor. Pink lips and teeth visible at frame edges. Bright, open oral environment.
environment.lighting: Bright natural overhead lighting, clean and vibrant. Slight warm glow on the tongue surface. Rim light on the leaf character edges.
environment.atmosphere: Clean, fresh, bright interior-of-mouth scene. Slightly cinematic as bad breath cloud appears and shatters.
environment.background_elements: Pink lips visible at top and sides of frame, white teeth at edges, bright interior mouth background
environment.foreground_props: Bad breath cloud: dark greenish-grey fog entity — not visible in first frame but materializes from background. BEAT 1: emerges/visible, shrinks back slightly in fear of Green Tea Leaf. BEAT 2: recoils as blue energy blast hits it. BEAT 3: completely shatters and vanishes — fragments dissolving. Pink tongue surface throughout. Blue energy blast appears Beat 2 only — shoots from character hands toward cloud.

global_motion_rules.camera_rule: Static camera with slow push in on Beat 3, then settles — no cuts, no angle changes
global_motion_rules.animation_rule: Beat 1: Green Tea Leaf snaps into striking martial arts pose, bad breath cloud shrinks back in fear, mouths SEALED. Beat 2: punches forward while speaking, blue energy blast shoots from hands toward bad breath cloud, mouth OPENS. Beat 3: calm power stance, bad breath cloud completely shatters and vanishes, mouth SEALED silent payoff. Camera slow push in then settles.

beats.mouth_animation: SEALED — no movement, no lip sync
beats.visuals: Green Tea Leaf snaps into a striking martial arts pose. The bad breath cloud shrinks back slightly in fear. Eyes fierce, mouth strictly SEALED.
beats.foreground_content: Pink tongue surface, Green Tea Leaf CENTER in striking pose, bad breath cloud visible in background shrinking back

beats.dialogue: Main green tea hoon, mujhse kulla karo aur saanson ki badboo hamesha bhagao.
beats.mouth_animation: OPENS naturally for Hindi speech — lip sync to full dialogue line
beats.visuals: Green Tea Leaf punches forward while speaking. A blast of fresh blue energy shoots from its hands toward the bad breath cloud. Mouth OPENS naturally.
beats.foreground_content: Pink tongue surface, Green Tea Leaf CENTER punching forward, blue energy blast shooting from hands, bad breath cloud recoiling

beats.visuals: Green Tea Leaf returns to calm power stance. The bad breath cloud completely shatters and vanishes. Mouth SEALED. Camera slow push in then settles.
beats.foreground_content: Pink tongue surface, Green Tea Leaf CENTER in calm power stance, bad breath cloud fragments dissolving. FOREGROUND LOCK: tongue and Green Tea Leaf only after cloud vanishes.

use_if_rushed.beat2_shorter_11w: Main green tea hoon, kulla karo aur badboo hamesha bhagao.
use_if_rushed.beat2_shorter_9w: Mujhse kulla karo, badboo hamesha bhagao.

negative_prompt: no camera cuts or angle changes
no repositioning of character from center frame
no extra speaking characters added to scene
no blurry face or distorted face geometry
no teeth showing in Beat 1 or Beat 3
no open mouth in Beat 1 or Beat 3
no additional mouth opening besides Beat 2
no watermark no logo no UI overlay
no realistic human skin — must stay Pixar 3D animated
scenes.final_compact_prompt_for_veo: Pixar 3D animated. An anthropomorphic green tea leaf character — shiny deep forest-green with fine veins, round sealed face — stands CENTER-FRAME on a glistening pink tongue surface inside a mouth. A dark greenish bad breath cloud looms in the background. Beat 1 (0-2s): Green Tea Leaf snaps into a fierce striking martial arts pose. Bad breath cloud shrinks back in fear. Mouth SEALED. Beat 2 (2-5s): Green Tea Leaf punches forward and speaks — 'Main green tea hoon, mujhse kulla karo aur saanson ki badboo hamesha bhagao.' A blast of fresh blue energy shoots from its hands, hitting the bad breath cloud. Mouth OPENS naturally for Hindi lip sync. Beat 3 (5-8s): Green Tea Leaf settles into calm power stance. Bad breath cloud completely shatters and vanishes — fragments dissolving. Mouth SEALED. Camera slow push in then settles. Static camera throughout — no cuts, no angle changes. Bright oral environment, clean Pixar 3D render.
